## What

Briefly describe the change and why it is needed.

## How

Notable implementation details, trade-offs, or follow-ups.

## Checklist

- [ ] Branched off `main` (no direct commits to `main`).
- [ ] `pnpm check` passes locally (typecheck + lint + format:check + test + knip + structure).
- [ ] Tests cover the normal path and obvious error cases.
- [ ] Updated `ARCHITECTURE.md` if package layout, module boundaries, or data flow changed.
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if the high-level pipeline or commands changed.
